testimonials.name: Ankit Verma
testimonials.review: Their understanding of edge constraints and real-world sensor noise was immediately apparent. Very engineering-driven engagement.

testimonials.name: Divyesh Shah
testimonials.review: Our system technically worked, but required constant operator intervention. Mactriq helped stabilize it and significantly reduced manual overrides.

testimonials.name: Rahul Mehta
testimonials.review: Mactriq helped us identify control issues that had gone unnoticed for months. The diagnostic was precise and grounded in how the system behaved.
